title: Endurance Items
description:
Keep your gear safe with Endurance Items
-->tools and armor stay in your inventory when they break instead of disappearing forever.
body:
### Tired of losing your gear?
-Endurance prevents items from being destroyed when they reach 0 durability!!!

## **FEATURES:**



- Snap Logic: Items stay at 1 HP and gain the BROKEN component.
  
- Useless State: Broken tools have 0 mining speed; broken armor provides 0 protection.
 
- Server Compatible: Works on both Singleplayer and Dedicated Servers.
 
- No More Despawning: Tools stay in your hand/inventory instead of breaking.
 
- Visual Feedback: Custom "Snapped!" alerts when an item fails.

- Total Nullification: A broken sword won't hurt a fly, and a broken chestplate won't stop a needle.

## **COMPATIBILITY:**
Both client and server side.
--will work with just being on server side but best when added on both!

## **DEPENDENCIES:**

```
Fabric API 0.139.4+1.21.11
```


## **FEEDBACK:**
If you wish to provide any feedback related to bugs or any improvements you wish to see in future updates then feel free to mail to me **mouldytoasty@gmail.com**.
